mapper.select: select change_id as changeId, instance_id as instanceId, task_id as taskId, definition_node_id as definitionNodeId, node_key_snapshot as nodeKeySnapshot, change_source as changeSource, actor_employee_id as actorEmployeeId, actor_name_snapshot as actorNameSnapshot, before_version as beforeVersion, after_version as afterVersion, changed_fields_json as changedFieldsJson, before_values_json as beforeValuesJson, after_values_json as afterValuesJson, create_time as createTime from t_bpm_form_data_change where instance_id = #{instanceId} order by change_id asc
